<h1 style="color: #D9B08C;text-align: center;font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;">Research Experience</h1>

---

## <span style="color: #D1E8E2;font-size: 0.8em;font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;"><i class="fas fa-briefcase" style="color:#FFCB9A;"></i><i class="fas fa-graduation-cap" style="color:#FFCB9A; margin-left: 10px;"></i> PhD in Marine Science and Technology</span>

<div style="margin-left: 30px;">
  <p style="font-weight: normal;color:#D1E8E2">ICMAN-CSIC, Cádiz, Spain</p>
  <p style="text-align: left;">
  <img src="csiclogo.png" alt="CSIC Logo" style="height: 25px;">
  <img src="icmanlogo.png" alt="ICMAN Logo" style="height: 25px;">
  </p>
  <p style="font-size: 0.9em;">January 2024 – ongoing</p>
  
  <p style= "color:#D1E8E2">Antarctic Biogeochemistry and Remote Sensing research.</p>
</div>
---

## <span style="color: #D1E8E2;font-size: 0.8em;font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;"><i class="fas fa-briefcase" style="color:#FFCB9A;"></i> Remote Sensing Scientist - Marine Strategies Project</span>

<div style="margin-left: 30px;">
  <p style="font-weight: normal;color:#D1E8E2">ICMAN-CSIC, Cádiz, Spain</p>
  <p style="text-align: left;">
  <img src="csiclogo.png" alt="CSIC Logo" style="height: 25px;">
  <img src="icmanlogo.png" alt="ICMAN Logo" style="height: 25px;">
  </p>
  <p style="font-size: 0.9em;">May 2023 – December 2023</p>
  
  <p style= "color:#D1E8E2">Responsibilities include:</p>
  <ul style="font-size: 0.9em;color:#D1E8E2">
      <li>Worked on satellite-based algorithms for the detection of marine heat events.</li>
      <li>Continued the development of the Andalusian Marine Observatory.</li>
  </ul>
</div>
---

## <span style="color: #D1E8E2;font-size: 0.8em;font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;"><i class="fas fa-briefcase" style="color:#FFCB9A;"></i> Remote Sensing Scientist - <img src="eurosealogo.png" alt="ES Logo" style="height: 35px;"> Project</span> 

<div style="margin-left: 30px;">
  <p style="font-weight: normal;color:#D1E8E2">ICMAN-CSIC & Marine Institute, Galway, Ireland</p>
  <p style="text-align: left;">
  <img src="csiclogo.png" alt="CSIC Logo" style="height: 25px;">
  <img src="icmanlogo.png" alt="ICMAN Logo" style="height: 25px;">
  
  <img src="milogo.png" alt="MI Logo" style="height: 25px;">
  
  </p>
  <p style="font-size: 0.9em;">August 2022 – March 2023</p>
  
  <p style= "color:#D1E8E2">Responsibilities include:</p>
  <ul style="font-size: 0.9em;color:#D1E8E2">
      <li>Collaboration at Galway’s Marine Institute within the framework of the EuroSea project for the development of an observation and warning system for risks derived from extreme marine events.</li>
  </ul>
</div>
---

## <span style="color: #D1E8E2;font-size: 0.8em;font-family: 'Jost', sans-serif;"><i class="fas fa-briefcase" style="color:#FFCB9A;"></i> Remote Sensing Scientist - Sat4Algae Project</span>

<div style="margin-left: 30px;">
  <p style="font-weight: normal;color:#D1E8E2">ICMAN-CSIC</p>
  <p style="text-align: left;">
  <img src="csiclogo.png" alt="CSIC Logo" style="height: 25px;">
  <img src="icmanlogo.png" alt="ICMAN Logo" style="height: 25px;">
  </p>
  <p style="font-size: 0.9em;">November 2021 – July 2022</p>
  
  <p style= "color:#D1E8E2">Responsibilities include:</p>
  <ul style="font-size: 0.9em;color:#D1E8E2">
      <li>Generated satellite tools for the detection of algal blooms, focusing on both macroalgae and microalgae.</li>
    <li>Contributed to the development of the Andalusian Marine Observatory as part of the Sat4Algae project.</li>
    <li>Collaborated in multidisciplinary teams to enhance satellite-based environmental monitoring capabilities.</li>
  </ul>
</div>
---
